allow: Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); links=d.get\('fields',{}\).get\('issuelinks',[]\); print\(json.dumps\(links, indent=2\)\) if links else print\('No issuelinks field found. Available fields:'\); [print\(k\) for k in sorted\(d.get\('fields',{}\).keys\(\)\)]")

Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Parent:', json.dumps\(d.get\('fields',{}\).get\('parent'\), indent=2\)\); print\('Epic:', d.get\('fields',{}\).get\('customfield_10006'\) or d.get\('fields',{}\).get\('customfield_10011'\)\)")
